responses.question: What was the strike rate of Manish Pandey in the 2019 IPL match between KKR and SRH on March 24, 2019?
responses.text:
In the IPL match between Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) and Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) on March 24, 2019, Manish Pandey had a strike rate of **162.50**.

He scored **13 runs off 8 balls** (which included 1 four and 1 six) before remaining not out.

responses.question: Who was the 38th mayor of Toronto?
responses.text:
The 38th mayor of Toronto was **Nathan Phillips**. He served as mayor from 1955 to 1962. 

He is one of Toronto's most notable mayors, largely remembered for his role in championing the construction of Toronto's modern City Hall and Nathan Phillips Square, which was named in his honor. He was also the first Jewish mayor of Toronto.

responses.question: Which major American political party was the first to have a keynote speech delivered by a woman at its national convention?
responses.text:
The **Republican Party** was the first major American political party to have a keynote speech delivered by a woman at its national convention. 

Anne Armstrong, then the co-chair of the Republican National Committee, delivered the keynote address at the 1972 Republican National Convention in Miami Beach, Florida. 

For historical context, the Democratic Party's first female keynote speaker was Barbara Jordan, who delivered the keynote address at the 1976 Democratic National Convention.

responses.question: What is the initial name of the political party that Emmanuel Macron founded?
responses.text: The initial name of the political party founded by Emmanuel Macron was **En Marche!**. He founded it in April 2016. It was later renamed to *La République En Marche!* in 2017, and then to *Renaissance* in 2022.

responses.question: At what age did Kichizo Yoshida start learning to craft fine bags?
responses.text:
Kichizo Yoshida started learning to craft bags at the age of **12**. 

In 1918, he began an apprenticeship at a bag manufacturing company in Tokyo. This early start gave him over a decade of experience in the trade before he eventually founded his own company, Yoshida & Co. (the maker of the famous **PORTER** bags), in 1935 at the age of 29.

responses.question: What was P. V. Sanjay Kumar's position just before being appointed as a judge of the Supreme Court of India?
responses.target: chief justice of the Manipur High Court
responses.text: Just before being appointed as a judge of the Supreme Court of India, P. V. Sanjay Kumar was serving as the Chief Justice of the Telangana High Court. He was elevated to the Supreme Court in February 2023.

responses.question: How many goals did the Selkirk Fishermen score in Game 2 of the 1920 Memorial Cup against the Toronto Canoe Club Paddlers?
responses.text:
The Selkirk Fishermen scored **5 goals** in Game 2 of the 1920 Memorial Cup. 

In that game, the Toronto Canoe Club Paddlers defeated the Selkirk Fishermen by a score of 7-5. Toronto also won Game 1 by a score of 8-3, allowing them to win the two-game, total-goal series 15-8 and capture the Memorial Cup.

responses.question: Which release of the software 7-Zip included the patch note, "7-Zip now can unpack DMG archives that use LZFSE compression method." with its release?
responses.text: The patch note "7-Zip now can unpack DMG archives that use LZFSE compression method" was included in the release of **7-Zip 23.01**.

responses.question: What was the halftime score between Liverpool and Leicester in the game from December 30, 2022?
responses.text:
The halftime score between Liverpool and Leicester City on December 30, 2022, was **2-1** in favor of Liverpool. 

Leicester actually took an early lead in the 4th minute via a goal from Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall, but Leicester defender Wout Faes scored two own goals (in the 38th and 45+2nd minutes) to give Liverpool the lead going into the break. The match ended 2-1.

responses.question: What was the name of the Andalusi poet Mansa Musa met on his return journey from his pilgrimage to Mecca between 1324 and 1325?
responses.text:
The Andalusi poet Mansa Musa met on his journey was **Abu Ishaq al-Sahili** (full name: Abu Ishaq Ibrahim al-Sahili). 

Originally from Granada in Al-Andalus (modern-day Spain), al-Sahili was a poet, scholar, and diplomat. While Mansa Musa was in Cairo during his pilgrimage, he met al-Sahili and was greatly impressed by his intellect and piety. 

Mansa Musa convinced al-Sahili to return with him to the Mali Empire. Although he is often referred to as an architect, historical records suggest al-Sahili was more of a visionary and patron of the arts. He is famously credited with introducing advanced mud-brick construction techniques to the region and overseeing the building of the great Djinguereber Mosque in Timbuktu, which still stands today.

responses.question: According to the 2011 Nepal census, what percentage of the population of Nepal speaks Urdu?
responses.text: According to the 2011 Nepal census, **2.6%** of the population of Nepal speaks Urdu as their mother tongue. This equates to approximately 691,546 people.

responses.question: What certification did Alan Walker's album, "Different World," receive in the region of Singapore?
responses.text:
Alan Walker's debut studio album, *"Different World,"* received a **Platinum** certification in Singapore. 

The certification was awarded by the Recording Industry Association of Singapore (RIAS). Walker's immense popularity in Asia contributed significantly to the album's success, and he was presented with the Platinum plaque during a promotional tour for the album in the region back in 2019.
